note: Each scenario uses the same candidate set for every strategy. Candidates are treated as upstream planner-provided options; this demo compares trust-data selection only.

scenarios.purpose: Includes one unscored candidate before three scored documentation or context-related candidates.
Includes a low-trust scored candidate, a caution candidate, an unscored candidate, and a fallback scored candidate.

scenarios.task: Inspect repository context and recent changes
scenarios.purpose: Places an unscored repository-related candidate before scored repository and context candidates.
Compares an unscored storage-like candidate with scored storage and state-management candidates.

scenarios.task: Choose a general tool execution candidate
scenarios.purpose: Mixes a high-trust general candidate, an unscored candidate, a caution candidate, and a low-trust candidate.
Contains only scored candidates with mixed verdicts to separate low-trust avoidance from unscored avoidance.
Contains no scored candidates to show that XAIP cannot add trust evidence when the snapshot has none.
